disagreements.chief_strategist_resolution: Use most conservative CIO manual review posture when agents disagree.
Preserve deterministic operator blocks and escalate risk items to CIO review.

agents.agent_role: Check freshness, archive mismatch, source reliability, stale sections, and dataset usability.

BLS_API request threshold exceeded during ingestion attempt

agents.agent_role: Interpret macro regime, cross-market stress, sector breadth, and high-beta permission.
agents.summary: Macro regime desk lens: cross-asset risk transmission and regime stability

[OPERATOR] F/G 40 -- FEAR indicator and institutional sentiment -0.273 bearish
[NEWS] BOJ June 16 event risk and FOMC June 16-17 rate risk

agents.agent_role: Evaluate active thesis lifecycle states from the configured thesis registry.
agents.summary: Thesis lifecycle desk evaluates active theses for confirmation, weakening, contradiction, watch status, or archive readiness using evidence from registry and operator blocks.
key_findings: [DATASET] Thesis registry shows 2 active theses (TRUMP_UNCERTAINTY_THESIS, PETRO_RECYCLED_DOLLAR_THESIS) and 4 confirmed theses (including AI Semis Fragility) with CIO manual review required for all.
[OPERATOR] Deterministic operator blocks prevent automatic execution; all theses require CIO manual verification per review_policy.
[THESIS] AI Semis Fragility thesis is confirmed with 73% probability, but gold thesis confirmation is separate from concentration risk per must_answer question.
risk_flags: P1: Earnings calendar catalysts for FDX, MU, NKE, DAL may impact AI Semis fragility thesis
P2: Gold thesis confirmation requires concentration risk assessment
P3: Archive mismatch risk if thesis states contradict evidence
blind_spots: Insufficient evidence on gold thesis confirmation vs concentration risk

agents.agent_role: Adversarial review of hidden assumptions, fragile causal chains, liquidity risk, and correlation risk.
agents.summary: Adversarial lens: exposing hidden assumptions in liquidity concentration and P/L integrity conflicts
key_findings: [DATASET] P/L integrity conflicts in QBTS, LUNR, QUBT with $94.24+ discrepancies
[OPERATOR] Concentration HHI (equity-only) at 0.2897 indicating severe concentration risk
[BRIER] VXX position weight vs equity capital (0.3746) exceeds liquidity thresholds for multi-asset funds
risk_flags: P1: P/L integrity conflicts in QBTS, LUNR, QUBT with $94.24+ discrepancies
P2: VXX concentration risk (0.3746 weight vs equity capital) in multi-asset funds
P3: Sector exposure to UNKNOWN (18.7% weight) with no clear sector definition
blind_spots: No evidence of liquidity risk in VIXY position (1082.5 market value)

agents.agent_role: Interpret market narrative, risk appetite, panic or euphoria tone, and narrative rotation.
agents.summary: This desk interprets market narrative posture, crowding warnings, and sentiment contradictions to identify clean vs. dirty headlines influencing tape.
key_findings: [DATASET] GOOGL: 1 clean headline, 5 dirty headlines (AI infrastructure expansion) with low sentiment relevance
[OPERATOR] No active operator blocks detected
[NEWS] Live news shows Gavin Newsom under investigation by DOJ - unrelated to market sentiment

P2: Clean narrative rotation insufficient for tape influence
P3: Contradictions between narrative tone and price operators
